prompt: Write a Ruby script at exactly /tmp/bench/fizzbuzz.rb that prints the numbers 1 to 15, one per line, replacing multiples of 3 with Fizz, multiples of 5 with Buzz, and multiples of 15 with FizzBuzz. Just create the file.
Write a Python 3 script at exactly /tmp/bench/sum.py that reads a JSON array of integers from stdin and prints their sum. Just create the file.

The file /tmp/bench/slug.rb defines a buggy slugify. Fix it in place so that slugify("Hello, World!") returns exactly "hello-world" (lowercase, non-alphanumerics collapsed to single hyphens, no leading/trailing hyphen).
